metric: IR-disclosed 신계약 CSM (YTD) from 한화손보 실적발표 PDF narrative (CSM roll-forward 변동원인). No 월납환산 disclosed in IR -> no derived multiple here. Recorded to FLAG a DART-numerator discrepancy.
data_quality_flag: DART/KIDI numerator for 한화손보 is ~2x the IR-stated value in 2023-2024 (FY2024: DART 14,820 vs IR 7,410), and 2025.1Q DART value (3,971.5) is a stale carryover identical to 2024.1Q. This inflates the KIDI NB CSM multiple to an implausible ~20-22x (user expects whole-portfolio <20, ~10-15). 2025.2Q DART (5,119) ~matches IR 1H (4,510). NEEDS focused review of the 한화손보 DART measurement (신계약 CSM) extraction. See spawned task.

2024.4Q.note: IR = FY2024 annual new-business CSM (변동원인 narrative)

2025.1Q.note: DART value is a stale carryover (==2024.1Q)
